finance.title: Robinhood's chief operating officer of crypto Tanya Denisova is leaving the firm
finance.blurb: Robinhood Crypto COO Tanya Denisova is leaving the firm after more than five years, as the trading platform navigates a sharp decline in crypto revenue and works to lessen its dependence on digital asset market cycles.

finance.title: SEC Commissioner Peirce counters views that crypto rule will foster synthetic tokens
finance.blurb: Hester Peirce, the commissioner behind the SEC's Crypto Task Force, made statements on the unreleased proposal, perhaps tamping down mistaken beliefs.

finance.title: Why Minnesota is empowering local banks to fight Wall Street for crypto revenue
finance.blurb: A local banker told CoinDesk that in light of Wall Street’s aggressive push into the crypto industry, Minnesota's financial institutions could not afford to remain on the sidelines.
